title: Young Franky and Iceburg
description: The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Tom, Iceburg, Yokozuna, World Government agent, Franky. The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The blueprint will be done soon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Can you connect to Enies Lobby?

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Everyone was over- wheelmed. The "sea train"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Yokozuna
dialogue.text: Thanks for the meal!! Come, Yokozuna!!

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: I'll teach you the crawl stroke!!

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: What's so funny?! You horned Raccoo!!!

summary: The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.
